flags.name: Sika Injection-107
flags.evidence: Sika Injection-107 does not appear on the Sika Australia injection catalogue (which lists Injection-111/-111C/-222/-306 and SikaInject-867); it is only catalogued on overseas Sika regional sites. Also mislabelled: the global PDS describes it as a 1-component HYDROPHOBIC water-reactive foaming PU, not a hydrophilic resin. https://aus.sika.com/en/construction/waterproofing/injections-and-hydrophilic-systems.html

flags.name: Mapei Mapeject PU 25H / PU 25HD
flags.evidence: 'Mapeject' is not a Mapei product line and 'PU 25H/PU 25HD' match no Mapei SKU. Mapei's PU injection resins are the Resfoam (1-comp) and Foamjet (2-comp) ranges. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions

flags.name: Fosroc Nitoseal MS250 / MS400
flags.evidence: Nitoseal MS250/MS400 are silyl-modified-polymer (MS/SMP hybrid) sealants containing no isocyanates; they are not polyurethane. https://www.fosroc.com.au/product/nitoseal-ms250

flags.name: Mapei Mapesil AC
flags.evidence: Mapesil AC is an acetoxy (acetic-cure) silicone sealant, not a polyurethane. https://www.mapei.com/au/en/products-and-solutions/products/detail/mapesil-ac

flags.name: Ardex RA 54
flags.evidence: ARDEX RA 54 is a semi-rigid polyurea control/construction-joint filler for trafficable floors, not a polyurethane sealant. https://ardexaustralia.com/product/ardex-ra-54/

flags.name: Hilti HIT-RE 500 V3 + N12 Bar
flags.evidence: This is the same HIT-RE 500 epoxy adhesive already listed under Epoxy Anchoring Adhesives, paired with a rebar dowel (a rebar-dowelling application, not a distinct product) - duplicate. Also superseded: Hilti AU now supplies HIT-RE 500 V4, not V3. https://www.hilti.com.au/c/CLS_FASTENER_7135/CLS_INJECTABLE_HY200_ADHESIVE_ANCHORS_7135

flags.name: Ramset Chemset Reo 502 PLUS
flags.evidence: Ramset ChemSet Reo502 PLUS is a pure-epoxy anchoring adhesive - it IS an epoxy anchoring adhesive and duplicates that subcategory rather than being a distinct dowel product. https://www.ramset.com.au/product/chemset-reo502-plus

flags.name: Ardex RA55
flags.evidence: No 'RA55' exists in the ARDEX Australia catalogue; ARDEX RA-series codes around this number (RA 54, RA 56) are PU/polyurea crack and joint products, not polymer-modified repair mortars. https://ardexaustralia.com/products/

recommendations.name: Mapei Epojet LV
recommendations.type: Very-low-viscosity 2-comp epoxy injection resin (microcracks / damp substrates)
recommendations.reason: Fills the sub-LV microcrack gap below standard low-viscosity epoxies; confirmed on mapei.com/au.

recommendations.name: Sika Sikadur-52 LP
recommendations.reason: AU-available hot-weather / deep-penetration companion to Sikadur-52 AU.

recommendations.name: Sika Injection-111 + Injection-111C
recommendations.type: 1-comp hydrophobic MDI water-reactive PU foam (+ catalyst)
recommendations.reason: Core current Sika Australia hydrophobic PU foam injection SKU; replaces the non-AU Injection-107.

recommendations.name: Mapei Resfoam 1KM
recommendations.reason: Real current Mapei Australia PU injection product; replaces the fabricated Mapeject entry.

recommendations.name: Fosroc Nitoseal PU400
recommendations.type: 1-comp polyurethane trafficable expansion-joint sealant (AS 4020 potable water)
recommendations.reason: Genuine PU expansion-joint sealant; fills the gap left when the MS/silicone products are moved out.

recommendations.name: Sika AnchorFix-3030
recommendations.reason: Current Sika Australia high-performance epoxy anchoring SKU.

recommendations.name: Ramset ChemSet Reo502 XTREM
recommendations.reason: Current Ramset Australia high-performance epoxy for cracked concrete / seismic dowelling.

recommendations.name: Sika MonoTop-412 NFG
recommendations.type: 1-comp polymer-modified fibre-reinforced structural repair mortar (EN 1504-3 R4)
recommendations.reason: Current Sika Australia R4 structural repair mortar; like-for-like replacement for the questionable SikaTop-121 entry.

recommendations.name: ARDEX BR 340
recommendations.type: Polymer-modified cementitious concrete repair / patching mortar
recommendations.reason: Real ARDEX Australia repair mortar to replace the non-existent RA55 entry.
